insight: PREREGISTRATION/CHRONOLOGY FAIL with retained exploratory operational evidence. The hypothesis, runner, and provider outputs first appear together after provider generation and before CI execution, so the stated design was post-provider/pre-execution and not independently frozen before provider output. The executed funnel remains evidenced: 42 targets -> 23 variants -> 20 official-harness-certified -> 12 gold-assisted targeted reference differentials across 8 repositories (5 new). This narrows the interpretation without invalidating retained patch, certification-log, or differential-log bytes. Combined with iter195's 10 protocol-failed exploratory rows, the released corpus has 22 reference-differential witnesses across 8 repositories.
